response.overview: Marketing specialist Iris returns to Cebu, dreading confrontations with her overly traditional mother who constantly pressures her about marriage. After a heated argument, she escapes on her motorcycle to the only place still open—a flower café where owner Hyacinth offers her warm tea and unexpected kindness. Iris returns nightly, needing the café's Wi-Fi for work. Hyacinth, whose struggling business could use marketing help, welcomes the arrangement. What begins as mutual convenience transforms into something deeper. Through late-night conversations, motorcycle rides, and shared dreams, they fall in love. But their relationship reveals painful differences. Hyacinth proudly introduces Iris as her girlfriend to her small café family. At Iris' home, Hyacinth is merely a "friend." When Iris' mother arranges a date with a churchmate's son, Iris says nothing-paralyzed by fear and guilt. This makes Hyacinth question whether their level of commitment is the same.
response.title: A Quiet Bloom
